title: Kalu Gale Yaka
description: A psychological horror mod featuring a terrifying 20-second darkness mechanic, massive Kalu Gal structures, and the Gale Yaka.
body:
# **Kalu Gale Yaka**
_A psychological horror experience that turns Minecraft survival into a true nightmare._

Dare to step into the dark? The Kalu Gale Yaka mod introduces a terrifying new lore-driven biome, ancient cursed tools, and an unrelenting boss entity that will actively stalk you through the shadows. Designed for hardcore survival players, this mod replaces standard Minecraft exploration with a deeply unsettling psychological horror experience.

 
## **🌑 The Kalu Gal Peaks Biome**
Forget the standard Overworld. When you stumble upon the towering, dark stone mountains of the Kalu Gal Peaks, you will realise you are entirely alone.

Pitch-Black Waters: The rivers run thick and dark, plunging players into absolute, blinding zero-visibility if they dare to dive underneath.

Dead Silence: The game's normal rules do not apply here. No pigs, no cows, no passive animals will spawn to keep you company.

The 20-Second Nightmare: The moment you cross the border into this cursed land, a heavy, blinding Darkness effect will wash over you for exactly 20 seconds, disorienting you just long enough for the hunt to begin.

 ![Larger and New Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24a4a52cf51e48940f6767e2db6cedc270c3f931.png)

👁️ The Gale Yaka 
This is not a normal mob. The Gala Yaka is a terrifying entity locked inside a massive, randomly generated structural house within the peaks.
The Stalker: He possesses a massive 256-block tracking radius. Once you are in his territory, he knows exactly where you are.

**Psychological Warfare:** As he hunts you, he will speak directly to you in the game's chat window, using a chilling mix of English and Sinhala dialogue ("Oya mava maruwat mama oyage pitipasse tamai enne").

**Heavy Hitter:** Boasting 100 Health (50 Hearts) and incredible speed, he cannot be knocked back. Running is your best option.

![The Yaka](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/313f6e129a9a2e9980c96a1e2e6e0337c6f7c91c.png)

You can only kill the Gale Yaka Mob using the "Kalu Gal Sword". It has the best Damage and the Fastest Attack Speed in Minecraft tools.

## **⚔️ Ancient Kalu Gal Tools**
Surviving the peaks requires wielding the cursed stone yourself. Search the biome for hidden Mossy Lore Chests and craft a brand-new tier of powerful equipment:

**• Kalu Gal Sword
• Kalu Gal Pickaxe
• Kalu Gal Axe**

All items and spawn eggs can be found in the custom Kalu Gale Yaka Creative Tab, and you can also craft them on a crafting table using Obsidian blocks.

## **🏚️ Custom Structures**
Explore the dark mountains to find carefully spaced, terrifying custom structures. Discover hidden lore chests covered in cobwebs, but beware—if you find the massive Gala Yaka House, the 5 entities waiting inside are ready for a bloodbath.
At- @MrMattRanger

 
 
## **How to Play**
There will be a lot of Bugs, Pls tell us all in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/Fx4NkH2rpq).

(https://youtu.be/YAuPHBdeQqM)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YAuPHBdeQqM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 

## **⚙️ Required Dependencies**
To play this mod without crashing, you must install the following alongside this file:

**• Fabric API
• TerraBlender (Fabric)
• (Highly Recommended: Xaero's Minimap)**

> Will you survive the Kalu Gal Peaks? Check out the official mod premiere and hardcore survival gameplay on the Vibra_X YouTube channel and my Discord Server!
